text:
The Conditional Auction Announcer is the announcer for a conditional auction held at an undisclosed location in Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 80 

Appearance

He has distinctive markings around both eyes and sports a goatee, wearing a shortened top with a thong and showing off well-defined abs. 

Personality

The Conditional Auction Announcer portrays himself as an exuberant and informative person. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The Conditional Auction Announcer welcomes the attendees and announces the auction theme: Hide and Seek. He notes that the seven pictures (of Phantom Troupe members) on the pamphlets being passed around are targets, and the goal is to capture them, with each target worth 200 million. He adds that they can capture them dead or alive and that their methods have no deadline or restriction. He finally tells them that the registration fee is 5 million and to contact the number listed when they have the targets. If someone is not up for the task, they can return the flyer to the staff.
